h1: Legal Contract Data Extraction for Law Firms

hero.headline: Automate Legal Contract Data Extraction for Faster Case Management
hero.subheadline: Extract key contract terms, dates, and parties from PDF contracts into structured Excel files for due diligence, compliance tracking, and client reporting.

summary: Law firms handle hundreds of contracts during due diligence, M&A transactions, and compliance audits. Manual extraction of contract terms, renewal dates, and key clauses is time-consuming and error-prone. AI-powered legal contract data extraction converts PDF contracts into structured Excel spreadsheets, enabling faster contract review and analysis.
whoItsFor: Corporate law firms handling M&A due diligence
Contract attorneys reviewing lease agreements and vendor contracts
whenThisIsRelevant: Due diligence phases requiring contract term summaries
Compliance audits needing systematic contract review
Contract renewal tracking and deadline management
expectedOutputs: Excel spreadsheets with contract terms per row
CSV files for legal database import
commonChallenges: Manual contract review takes weeks during due diligence
Missing critical renewal dates and termination clauses
Inconsistent contract term extraction across team members
Difficulty creating contract summaries for client reports
howItWorksSteps: Upload contract PDFs or batch process contract folders
AI identifies and extracts key contract fields like parties, dates, terms, and clauses
Review extracted data and customize fields for specific contract types
Export structured contract data to Excel for analysis and reporting
whyPdfExcelAiFits: AI extracts contract-specific fields like effective dates, termination clauses, and governing law
Batch processing handles entire contract portfolios at once
OCR processes scanned contracts from older transactions
99%+ accuracy on clear contract documents reduces manual review time
limitations: Complex nested contract tables may require manual verification
Heavily redacted contracts may have incomplete field extraction
Handwritten contract amendments have limited recognition accuracy

faq.question: What contract fields can be extracted automatically?
faq.answer: Common fields include party names, effective dates, termination dates, contract values, governing law, renewal terms, and key obligations. Custom fields can be configured for specific contract types.

faq.question: How accurate is AI extraction on legal contracts?
faq.answer: Accuracy reaches 99%+ on clear, well-formatted digital contracts. Scanned contracts and complex layouts may require review, especially for critical terms like liability caps or termination clauses.

faq.question: Can this process contracts in batches for due diligence?
faq.answer: Yes, batch processing handles multiple contract folders simultaneously. Each contract becomes a row in the output Excel file, making it ideal for due diligence contract summaries.

faq.question: What happens to sensitive contract data after processing?
faq.answer: All contract files are encrypted during processing and automatically deleted afterward. No contract data is stored permanently or used for AI training purposes.

trustSignals: Files encrypted and deleted after processing
